name: scope
description: Plan, track, and report on multi-step work with the Scope kanban CLI and web UI.

interface.shortDescription: Use Scope tickets while you work in Codex.
interface.longDescription: Scope teaches Codex when and how to use the local-first Scope kanban: plan multi-step work with epics and stories, list open tickets for context, mark work done, attach branches and PRs, and track real bugs with reproducible notes.
